article.title: China's Hanyuan-2 debuts as 'world's first' dual-core quantum computer — 200-qubit claims incredible power efficiency, but lacks critical performance benchmarks
article.summary: CAS Cold Atom Technology, a Wuhan-based firm affiliated with the Chinese Academy of Sciences (CAS), unveiled what it calls the world's first dual-core quantum computer.
article.title_zh: 中國Hanyuan-2亮相「全球首款」雙核量子計算機——200量子位聲稱具有驚人的功率效率，但缺乏關鍵性能基準
article.summary_zh: 與中國科學院(CAS)附屬的武漢企業CAS Cold Atom Technology公開推出其號稱全球首款雙核量子計算機。

article.title: Here’s how Apple could make its Hide My Email feature even better for iCloud+ users
article.summary: Introduced in iOS 15, Hide My Email is an iCloud+ feature that does exactly what it says on the tin – you can create an alternative email address for each individual service you sign up for, and easily cut off said email whenever you’d like. It prevents advertisers from having your primary email address, and gives you better inbox control – a total win-win. That said, despite being introduced 5 years ago, the feature hasn’t progressed as much as it realistically could have. Here are my suggestions for how Apple could improve Hide My Email. more…
article.title_zh: Apple 如何為 iCloud+ 用戶進一步改進其 Hide My Email 功能
article.summary_zh: Hide My Email 是在 iOS 15 中推出的 iCloud+ 功能，允許用戶為每個服務創建替代電子郵件地址，並隨時輕鬆停用該郵件。

article.title: Why 157,000 developers are hedging against Anthropic with OpenCode
article.summary: Anthropic spent its biggest developer day of the year showing what a managed coding harness looks like at full scale. At the inaugural Code with Claude conference on Wednesday, the company doubled Claude Code’s five-hour rate limits for Pro, Max, Team, and seat-based Enterprise plans, removed peak-hour reductions, raised Opus API limits, and signed a SpaceX deal for the full capacity of the Colossus 1 data center , more than 300 megawatts, and 220,000 Nvidia GPUs coming online within the month. Updates to Managed Agents added multi-agent orchestration and Outcomes to public beta; dreaming for self-improving memory landed in research preview; and Boris Cherny demonstrated remote agents and routines that turn Claude Code into an asynchronous workflow engine. That announcement is one ha
article.title_zh: 為什麼157,000位開發者正在透過OpenCode對沖Anthropic的風險
article.summary_zh: Anthropic在年度最大開發者日展示了Claude Code的完整規模託管編碼方案，並在首次Code with Claude會議上將Pro、Max、Team和Enterprise計劃的五小時使用限制提高了一倍。

article.title: Former Epic director is building a European rival to the Unreal and Unity game engines — 'The Immense Engine' dev sees opportunity for AI agents to 'do the work of ten or fifteen people'
article.summary: A heavyweight games industry veteran says he is building a fully European alternative to popular games engines from American and Chinese companies.
article.title_zh: 前Epic總監正在打造Unreal和Unity遊戲引擎的歐洲競爭對手——「The Immense Engine」開發者認為AI代理可以「完成十到十五人的工作」
article.summary_zh: 一位遊戲業資深人士表示正在開發完全由歐洲開發的遊戲引擎，作為美國和中國公司流行引擎的替代品。

article.title: Tiny credit card computer includes eInk screen and is just 1mm thick — Muxcard is powered by the ESP32-C3 microcontroller
article.summary: A GitHub project shares details of the prototype for 'a fully working computer that is literally the size of a credit card,' dubbed the Muxcard
article.title_zh: 微型信用卡電腦配備電子墨水屏幕且厚度僅1毫米——Muxcard由ESP32-C3微控制器驅動
article.summary_zh: GitHub項目分享了名為Muxcard的原型設計細節，這是「一台字面上信用卡大小的功能完整電腦」。

article.title: $200 'socketed' Nvidia AI GPU for servers hacked into a PCIe card with custom PCB and 3D-printed cooling — modded Tesla V100 SMX data center GPU runs AI LLMs and is more efficient than many modern midrange offerings in AI inference
article.summary: Turns out, Nvidia's older Turing-era V100 AI GPU is still pretty capable today, even with just 16GB of VRAM. A YouTuber got his hands on the SMX variant for just $100, converted it to a PCIe x16 interface for another $100 with an adapter, and got some pretty impressive results across AI inference and NVR benchmarks.
article.title_zh: 200美元「插槽式」Nvidia AI GPU被改造成帶有定製PCB和3D打印冷卻的PCIe卡——改裝的Tesla V100 SMX數據中心GPU運行AI LLM，AI推理效率超過許多現代中端產品
article.summary_zh: 事實證明Nvidia Turing時代的V100 AI GPU即使只有16GB VRAM至今仍相當強大；一名YouTuber以100美元購得SMX變體，再花100美元製作適配器轉換為PCIe x16接口，在AI推理方面取得令人印象深刻的成果。

article.title: Alphabet Plans Debut Yen Bond Sale as AI Race Accelerates
article.summary: Alphabet Inc. is planning to issue yen bonds for the first time in a move that may help fund investments as artificial intelligence competition intensifies.
article.title_zh: Alphabet 計劃首次發行日圓債券 加速 AI 競賽
article.summary_zh: Alphabet Inc. 計劃首次發行日圓債券，以籌措資金應對日益激烈的人工智能競爭。

article.title: Could Contact-Tracing Apps Help With the Hantavirus? Not Really
article.summary: Contact-tracing apps were widely deployed during the Covid pandemic. They aren’t as helpful during smaller outbreaks.
article.title_zh: 接觸追蹤應用程式能幫助對抗漢病毒嗎？並不能
article.summary_zh: Covid 疫情期間廣泛部署的接觸追蹤應用程式在較小規模的疫情爆發中幫助有限。

article.title: MachinaCheck: Building a Multi-Agent CNC Manufacturability System on AMD MI300X
article.title_zh: MachinaCheck：在 AMD MI300X 上構建多代理 CNC 可製造性系統

article.title: Claude can now follow users across Outlook, Word, Excel, and PowerPoint
article.summary: Anthropic is expanding Claude’s reach across Microsoft 365, adding Outlook support while bringing Word, Excel, and PowerPoint integrations into general availability. The update means Claude can now follow work across emails, documents, spreadsheets, and slide decks within a single ongoing conversation, allowing context to persist as users move between apps. The launch builds on Anthropic’s earlier Microsoft 365 push unveiled in February , which introduced shared context between Excel and PowerPoint alongside a broader plugin ecosystem for Claude Cowork . The expansion pushes Claude further into day-to-day workplace workflows, particularly inside Microsoft’s productivity suite. “Claude can now follow work across emails, documents, spreadsheets, and slide decks within
article.title_zh: Claude現已可在Outlook、Word、Excel和PowerPoint中跨應用追蹤用戶
article.summary_zh: Anthropic擴展Claude在Microsoft 365中的覆蓋範圍，新增Outlook支持並將Word、Excel和PowerPoint整合推向正式發布，使Claude能在單一持續對話中跨越郵件、文件、試算表和簡報進行追蹤。
